title: Fix Task.WhenAll Exception Masking — Unwrap AggregateException
description:
CRITICAL finding from Error Handling Auditor. `Task.WhenAll` at AgentBackgroundService.cs:471 wraps multiple exceptions into AggregateException. If both DispatchActionsAsync and ChatConsumerAsync fault before MonitorAndCancelOnFaultAsync cancels the CTS, only the first exception is logged. The other task's exception context is permanently lost.

Fix: Unwrap AggregateException.InnerExceptions in the catch block at line 482 and log each one individually.

Source: Sprint 51 Council, Error Handling Auditor, Finding F-WHENALL
